notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Tyler Phillips. Kevin McGonigle scores. Gleyber Torres to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jakob Marsee GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jakob Marsee grounds into a double play, second baseman Gleyber Torres to shortstop Kevin McGonigle to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Austin Slater out at 2nd. Jakob Marsee out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Liam Hicks pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Liam Hicks grounds out to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.

notableEvents.label: Agustín Ramírez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Agustín Ramírez grounds into a double play, third baseman Zach McKinstry to second baseman Gleyber Torres to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Austin Slater out at 2nd. Agustín Ramírez out at 1st.
